name: Gypsy Water
description: A smoky, earthy unisex scent with bright citrus opening into a pine‑campfire warmth, great for relaxed everyday wear.
brandDesc: Byredo is a minimalist, story‑driven house blending modern contrasts like citrus, incense, and woods into wearable, conceptual perfumes.

name: Eleventh Hour
description: Warm, boozy amber with dried‑fruit sweetness and soft woods, ideal for cold evenings and close‑to‑skin occasions.
brandDesc: Byredo often uses warm resins, incense, and subtle sweetness to tell emotional, memory‑driven stories.

name: Mixed Emotions
description: Dry, inky tea and woods with a subtle fruitiness, wearing like a contemplative, quiet veil perfect for workdays.
brandDesc: Byredo experiments with tea, ink, and smoke notes to create conceptual yet wearable perfumes.

name: Bal d'Afrique
description: A sunlit, slightly sweet floral with sparkling citrus and soft vetiver, great for warm days and joyful casual wear.
brandDesc: Byredo’s florals often pair bright citruses with musky, woody bases for a luminous, modern feel.

name: Blanche
description: A clean, laundry‑fresh floral with soft rose and creamy sandalwood, ideal for office days and low‑key settings.
brandDesc: Byredo uses aldehydes and soft florals to create abstract, fresh fragrances that feel like clean fabric.

name: Bibliothèque
description: A plush, library‑like scent with fruity sweetness over powdery florals and creamy woods, refined for work or evening.

name: Oud Immortel
description: Smoky, resinous oud and leather wrapped in incense and woods, powerful and best in cold air or dressed‑up settings.
brandDesc: Byredo’s oud compositions skew modern and polished, focusing on smoky woods rather than barnyard facets.

name: Alto Astral
description: A salty, shimmering coconut and jasmine accord with airy aldehydes, playful and slightly otherworldly in warm weather.
brandDesc: Byredo’s gourmands tend to be translucent and textural rather than heavy dessert‑like perfumes.

name: Super Cedar
description: A smooth, pencil‑shavings cedar softened by creamy notes, minimal and polished for daily or office wear.
brandDesc: Byredo’s woody scents often spotlight a single material, like cedar, in a pared‑back, design‑forward way.

name: Mojave Ghost
description: An ethereal, slightly sweet floral‑woody cloud that feels like warm skin and desert air, easy as a signature scent.
brandDesc: Byredo is known for weightless, skin‑like signatures that feel both familiar and subtly strange.

name: 1996 Inez & Vinoodh
description: A lush, vintage‑leaning floral with violet and tuberose over creamy woods, bold and artistic as a statement scent.
brandDesc: Byredo’s collaborations often lean into conceptual, photograph‑inspired storytelling in scent form.

name: Pulp
description: Overripe, juicy fruit with a slightly green bite and an amber‑woody base, loud and playful for creative moods.

name: Lil Fleur
description: A bright, slightly sweet floral with citrus sparkle and a soft woody base, youthful but polished for daily wear.

name: Sellier
description: A tailored leather scent with spices and iris, evoking a structured jacket rather than a rough hide, ideal for dressed‑up moments.
brandDesc: Byredo’s leathers feel like fashion pieces: smooth, structured, and paired with florals and woods.

name: Inflorescence
description: A bouquet of dewy white flowers with a soft musky base, airy and office‑friendly in warm weather.
brandDesc: Byredo’s white florals tend to be sheer and luminous, avoiding heavy indolic facets.

name: Seven Veils
description: A spicy, resinous amber with creamy florals and vanilla, seductive and enveloping in cold weather or nighttime.
brandDesc: Byredo’s ambers often mix spice, resin, and soft florals for sensual, layered warmth.

name: Black Saffron
description: Dark, slightly smoky saffron and leather over woods, bold yet polished as a signature for evening or creative work.

name: Baudelaire
description: A moody mix of incense, patchouli, and leather over cool woods, evocative and artistic on cold, dressed‑up days.
brandDesc: Byredo often names deeper scents after artists or writers, channeling moodier, complex accords.

name: Tulipe
description: A pastel, powdery floral with a gentle musk and sandalwood base, subtle and office‑safe.

name: Sunday Cologne
description: Bright, clean citrus opening with a hint of floral and a soft musky base, perfect for warm‑weather casual wear.
brandDesc: Byredo’s citrus line keeps things fresh and modern, often with a subtle floral or musky finish.

name: Oud Neroli
description: Rich, slightly bitter neroli offset by dark oud and amber, luxurious and best for formal or special occasions.

name: Rose Noir
description: Spicy, slightly smoky rose‑peony with a hint of pepper; elegant and modern for evening or formal wear.

name: Sundazed
description: Sunny, citrusy floral with a hint of spice and soft musk, ideal for warm, outdoor days.

name: Slow Dance
description: Soft, pear‑accented jasmine and ylang‑ylang with a powdery iris finish, intimate and slightly romantic.

name: Endeavour
description: Fresh, crisp green citrus with a woody hinoki and geranium heart, lively and wearable on warm days.
